description: Review MiniMax voice clone job status, failure reasons, and billing results.
loadFailed: Failed to load voice clone records
title: Voice Clones

failureDetail.unableToDecodeAudio: Audio could not be decoded. Please record again, or upload an mp3, m4a, or wav file.
failureDetail.unsupportedAudioType: Unsupported audio format. Please upload an mp3, m4a, or wav file.
failureDetail.emptyAudio: The audio file is empty. Please upload a valid audio file.
failureDetail.sourceTooShort: The audio is too short. Please upload audio that is at least 10 seconds long.
failureDetail.audioExpired: The source audio has expired. Please upload the audio again and retry.
failureDetail.sourceTooLong: The audio is longer than 5 minutes. Please upload a shorter audio file.
failureDetail.promptTooLong: The preview audio is longer than 8 seconds. Please shorten it and try again.
failureDetail.invalidAudioPurpose: The audio processing type is invalid. Please contact engineering for investigation.
failureDetail.minimaxApiKeyMissing: MiniMax configuration is missing. Please contact engineering to check service configuration.
failureDetail.minimaxFileIdMissing: MiniMax file upload did not return a file ID. Please retry later or contact engineering.
failureDetail.sensitiveContent: MiniMax marked the audio as sensitive. Please replace the audio and try again.
failureDetail.billingPending: The voice was generated, but billing capture is pending. Please check billing records.
failureDetail.audioResourceMissing: The audio resource is missing. Please upload the audio again and retry.
